ROOT: Woodland Warfare

Command your woodland faction to victory! Control territories, build structures, and manage resources across a strategic map. Each faction has unique abilities: Marquise builds workshops for victory points, Alliance spreads sympathy to recruit warriors, Eyrie follows decrees for power, and Vagabond travels light collecting items. Reach 30 victory points first to win through clever positioning, faction-specific strategies, and tactical combat.

Controls: Arrow Keys: Navigate clearings | Space: Confirm action | Z: Cancel | Shift: Toggle actions
